detail.description:
Join millions of players worldwide as you build your village, raise a clan, and compete in epic Clan Wars!

Mustachioed Barbarians, fire wielding Wizards, and other unique troops are waiting for you! Enter the world of Clash!

Classic Features:
● Join a Clan of fellow players or start your own and invite friends.
● Fight in Clan Wars as a team against millions of active players across the globe.
● Test your skills in the competitive Clan War Leagues and prove you’re the best.
● Forge alliances,
detail.recentChanges:
On Guard!
• New Guardian: Logger joins Town Hall 18 to sling mighty stumps at ground and air enemies!
• New Common Hero Equipment: Sink your teeth into defenses with Dragon Duke’s Electro Fangs and chomp a chain reaction through villages!
• New Siege Machine: The Sky Wagon offers reliable troop delivery to the heart of your opponent’s village!
• Legend League Rework: Legend League has been divided into three unique levels to offer more variety for top-ranked players!
